title: SP Ore Banknotes
description: Resource pack that replaces the texture of diamond ore and deepslate diamond ore with banknotes
body:
## SP Ore Banknotes

Resource pack that replaces the texture of **diamond ore** and **deepslate diamond ore** with banknotes

![New Ore Textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/32b030186e38f0b390d281df2262afbe15c3b705.png)

### Requirements:
- **OptiFine**
- **Minecraft 1.17+**
 
Ore texture changes in these amounts: 1-10 / 11-31 / 32-63 / 64


<details>
<summary>RU</summary>

Ресурспак, заменяющий текстуры **алмазной руды** и **глубинной алмазной руды** на купюры

![New Ore Textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/32b030186e38f0b390d281df2262afbe15c3b705.png)

### Требуется:
- **OptiFine**
- **Minecraft 1.17+**
 
Текстура руды изменяется в таких количествах: 1-10 / 11-31 / 32-63 / 64

</details>
